    FROM teams t2
    WHERE t2.team_id = p.team_id
)

query: Show each player with their team and league names.
sql:
SELECT p.full_name, t.team_name, l.league_name
FROM players p
JOIN teams t ON p.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN leagues l ON t.league_id = l.league_id

query: Show each coach with their team and league names.
sql:
SELECT c.first_name, c.last_name, t.team_name, l.league_name
FROM coaches c
JOIN teams t ON c.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN leagues l ON t.league_id = l.league_id

query: Show each match with season, league, home team, and away team.
sql:
SELECT m.match_id, s.season_name, l.league_name, ht.team_name AS home_team_name, at.team_name AS away_team_name
FROM matches m
JOIN seasons s ON m.season_id = s.season_id
JOIN leagues l ON m.league_id = l.league_id
JOIN teams ht ON m.home_team_id = ht.team_id
JOIN teams at ON m.away_team_id = at.team_id

query: Show each player match record with player name, team name, and match date.
sql:
SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name, t.team_name, m.match_date
FROM player_match_stats pms
JOIN players p ON pms.player_id = p.player_id
JOIN teams t ON pms.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN matches m ON pms.match_id = m.match_id

query: Show each contract with player name, team name, and league name.
sql:
SELECT c.contract_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, t.team_name, l.league_name
FROM contracts c
JOIN players p ON c.player_id = p.player_id
JOIN teams t ON c.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN leagues l ON t.league_id = l.league_id

query: Show each injury with player name, team name, and match date when available.
sql:
SELECT i.injury_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, t.team_name, m.match_date
FROM injuries i
JOIN players p ON i.player_id = p.player_id
JOIN teams t ON i.team_id = t.team_id
LEFT JOIN matches m ON i.match_id = m.match_id

query: Show each training session with team, coach, and season names.
sql:
SELECT ts.training_session_id, t.team_name, c.first_name, c.last_name, s.season_name
FROM training_sessions ts
JOIN teams t ON ts.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN coaches c ON ts.coach_id = c.coach_id
JOIN seasons s ON ts.season_id = s.season_id

query: Show each training record with player, team, and session date.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.team_id, t.session_date
FROM player_training_stats p
JOIN training_sessions t ON p.training_session_id = t.training_session_id

query: Show each transfer with player, former team, and destination team.
sql:
SELECT t.transfer_id, p.full_name, tm.team_name
FROM transfers t
JOIN players p ON t.player_id = p.player_id
JOIN teams tm ON t.to_team_id = tm.team_id
audit_note: Returns only the destination team and omits the former team.

query: Show each completed match with winning team and league name.
sql:
SELECT m.match_id, t.team_name, l.league_name
FROM matches m
JOIN teams t ON m.winner_team_id = t.team_id
JOIN leagues l ON m.league_id = l.league_id
WHERE m.match_status = 'completed'

query: Show each active player with team, league, and coach names.
sql:
SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name, t.team_name, l.league_name, c.first_name, c.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN teams t ON p.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN leagues l ON t.league_id = l.league_id
JOIN training_sessions ts ON t.team_id = ts.team_id
JOIN coaches c ON ts.coach_id = c.coach_id
WHERE p.active_flag = '1'
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, t.team_name, l.league_name, c.first_name, c.last_name

query: Show each match performance with player position and competition stage.
sql:
SELECT pms.player_id, pms.match_id, pms.position_played, m.competition_stage
FROM player_match_stats pms
JOIN matches m ON pms.match_id = m.match_id

query: Show each injury with player position and team league.
sql:
SELECT i.injury_id, p.position, l.league_name
FROM injuries i
JOIN players p ON i.player_id = p.player_id
JOIN teams t ON i.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN leagues l ON t.league_id = l.league_id

query: Show each active contract with player position and team league.
sql:
SELECT c.contract_id, c.contract_status, p.position, l.league_name
FROM contracts c
JOIN players p ON c.player_id = p.player_id
JOIN teams t ON c.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN leagues l ON t.league_id = l.league_id
WHERE c.contract_status = 'active'

query: Show each transfer with player position and season name.
sql:
SELECT t.transfer_id, p.position, s.season_name
FROM transfers t
JOIN players p ON t.player_id = p.player_id
JOIN seasons s ON t.season_id = s.season_id

query: List active players with team, league, and active-contract details.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, t.team_name, l.league_name, c.contract_id, c.contract_status, c.base_salary
FROM players p
JOIN teams t ON p.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN leagues l ON t.league_id = l.league_id
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
WHERE p.active_flag = '1'
  AND c.contract_status = 'active'

query: List completed matches with season, league, both teams, and winning team.
sql:
SELECT m.match_id, s.season_name, l.league_name, h.team_name AS home_team_name, a.team_name AS away_team_name, w.team_name AS winning_team_name
FROM matches m
JOIN seasons s ON m.season_id = s.season_id
JOIN leagues l ON m.league_id = l.league_id
JOIN teams h ON m.home_team_id = h.team_id
JOIN teams a ON m.away_team_id = a.team_id
JOIN teams w ON m.winner_team_id = w.team_id
WHERE m.match_status = 'completed'

query: List player performances with player, team, match, season, and league details.
sql:
SELECT 
    p.first_name,
    p.last_name,
    t.team_name,
    m.match_date,
    s.season_name,
    l.league_name,
    pms.scores,
    pms.assists,
    pms.minutes_played
FROM player_match_stats pms
JOIN players p ON pms.player_id = p.player_id
JOIN teams t ON pms.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN matches m ON pms.match_id = m.match_id
JOIN seasons s ON pms.season_id = s.season_id
JOIN leagues l ON m.league_id = l.league_id

query: List severe injuries with player, team, match, and season details.
sql:
SELECT i.injury_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, t.team_name, m.match_id, s.season_name
FROM injuries i
JOIN players p ON i.player_id = p.player_id
JOIN teams t ON i.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN matches m ON i.match_id = m.match_id
JOIN seasons s ON m.season_id = s.season_id
WHERE i.severity = 'severe'

query: List high-intensity training performances with player, coach, team, and season.
sql:
SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name, c.first_name, c.last_name, t.team_name, s.season_name, pts.training_load, ts.intensity_level
FROM player_training_stats pts
JOIN players p ON pts.player_id = p.player_id
JOIN teams t ON pts.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN seasons s ON pts.season_id = s.season_id
JOIN training_sessions ts ON pts.training_session_id = ts.training_session_id
JOIN coaches c ON ts.coach_id = c.coach_id
WHERE ts.intensity_level = 'high'

query: List completed transfers with player, former team, destination team, and season.
sql: SELECT "players"."full_name", "teams"."team_name" AS "former_team", "teams"."team_name" AS "destination_team", "seasons"."season_name" FROM "transfers" INNER JOIN "players" ON "transfers"."player_id" = "players"."player_id" INNER JOIN "seasons" ON "transfers"."season_id" = "seasons"."season_id" INNER JOIN "teams" ON "players"."team_id" = "teams"."team_id" WHERE "transfers"."transfer_status" = ?
audit_note: Uses the player's current team for both former_team and destination_team instead of joining from_team_id and to_team_id separately.

query: List players who scored in completed matches with team and league details.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT "players"."first_name", "players"."last_name", "teams"."team_name", "leagues"."league_name" FROM "player_match_stats" INNER JOIN "matches" ON "player_match_stats"."match_id" = "matches"."match_id" INNER JOIN "leagues" ON "matches"."league_id" = "leagues"."league_id" INNER JOIN "players" ON "player_match_stats"."player_id" = "players"."player_id" INNER JOIN "teams" ON "player_match_stats"."team_id" = "teams"."team_id" WHERE "matches"."match_status" = ? AND "player_match_stats"."scores" > ?

query: List active players who have both an active contract and a training record.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT "players"."player_id", "players"."first_name", "players"."last_name" FROM "players" INNER JOIN "contracts" ON "players"."player_id" = "contracts"."player_id" INNER JOIN "player_training_stats" ON "players"."player_id" = "player_training_stats"."player_id" WHERE "players"."active_flag" = ? AND "contracts"."contract_status" = ?

query: List players with surgery-required injuries and their current contract details.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, i.injury_id, i.injury_type, i.body_part, c.contract_id, c.contract_type, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.base_salary
FROM players p
JOIN injuries i ON p.player_id = i.player_id
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
WHERE i.surgery_required_flag = '1'

query: List coaches who led training sessions for active teams in active leagues.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.coach_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
FROM coaches c
JOIN training_sessions ts ON c.coach_id = ts.coach_id
JOIN teams t ON ts.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN leagues l ON t.league_id = l.league_id
WHERE t.active_flag = '1'
  AND l.active_flag = '1'

query: List completed matches involving teams from active leagues with season revenue.
sql:
SELECT m.match_id, m.home_team_id, m.away_team_id, m.match_date, m.home_score, m.away_score, s.revenue_total
FROM matches m
JOIN seasons s ON m.season_id = s.season_id
JOIN leagues l ON m.league_id = l.league_id
WHERE m.match_status = 'completed'
  AND l.active_flag = '1'

query: List players whose match team and training team are the same.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON p.player_id = pts.player_id
WHERE pms.team_id = pts.team_id

query: List players who transferred to their current team and later appeared in a match for that team.
sql:
WITH latest_transfers AS (
    SELECT player_id, to_team_id, transfer_date
    FROM (
        SELECT player_id, to_team_id, transfer_date,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_id ORDER BY transfer_date DESC) AS rn
        FROM transfers
    )
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.team_id
FROM players p
JOIN latest_transfers lt ON p.player_id = lt.player_id
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id AND p.team_id = pms.team_id
JOIN matches m ON pms.match_id = m.match_id
WHERE p.team_id = lt.to_team_id
  AND m.match_date > lt.transfer_date

query: List teams with active players, active coaches, and completed matches.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN players p ON t.team_id = p.team_id
JOIN coaches c ON t.team_id = c.team_id
JOIN matches m ON t.team_id = m.home_team_id OR t.team_id = m.away_team_id
WHERE p.active_flag = '1'
  AND c.active_flag = '1'
  AND m.match_status = 'completed'
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_id) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT c.coach_id) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT m.match_id) > 0

query: List player injuries linked to matches, including both match teams.
sql:
SELECT i.injury_id, i.player_id, i.match_id, i.injury_type, i.severity, m.home_team_id, m.away_team_id
FROM injuries i
JOIN matches m ON i.match_id = m.match_id

query: List active contracts for players who appeared in completed matches.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.contract_id, c.player_id, c.contract_status, c.start_date, c.end_date
FROM contracts c
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON c.player_id = pms.player_id
JOIN matches m ON pms.match_id = m.match_id
WHERE c.contract_status = 'active'
  AND m.match_status = 'completed'

query: List training sessions attended by players who also have match appearances.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ts.training_session_id, ts.session_date, ts.session_type, pts.player_id
FROM training_sessions ts
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON ts.training_session_id = pts.training_session_id
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON pts.player_id = pms.player_id
audit_note: Treats any training performance row as attendance and never requires attendance_status = 'present'.

query: List permanent transfers involving players with active contracts at the destination team.
sql:
SELECT t.transfer_id, t.player_id, t.to_team_id, t.transfer_date, t.transfer_type, t.transfer_fee
FROM transfers t
WHERE t.transfer_type = 'permanent'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM contracts c
    WHERE c.player_id = t.player_id
      AND c.team_id = t.to_team_id
      AND c.contract_status = 'active'
  )

query: List teams with player contracts, injury records, and training sessions.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN contracts c ON c.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN injuries i ON i.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN training_sessions ts ON ts.team_id = t.team_id
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.contract_id) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT i.injury_id) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT ts.training_session_id) > 0

query: List leagues with active teams, completed matches, and completed transfers.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT "leagues"."league_name" FROM "leagues" INNER JOIN "matches" ON "leagues"."league_id" = "matches"."league_id" INNER JOIN "teams" ON "leagues"."league_id" = "teams"."league_id" INNER JOIN "transfers" ON "teams"."team_id" = "transfers"."from_team_id" WHERE "teams"."active_flag" = ? AND "matches"."match_status" = ? AND "transfers"."transfer_status" = ?
audit_note: Recognizes completed transfers only through from_team_id, excluding leagues represented solely by destination teams.

query: List players who scored in a completed match, attended high-intensity training, and have an active contract.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
JOIN matches m ON pms.match_id = m.match_id
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON p.player_id = pts.player_id
JOIN training_sessions ts ON pts.training_session_id = ts.training_session_id
WHERE c.contract_status = 'active'
  AND pms.scores > 0
  AND m.match_status = 'completed'
  AND ts.intensity_level = 'high'
audit_note: Treats any training record as attendance and never requires attendance_status = 'present'.

query: List teams whose players have both severe injuries and completed transfer records.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN injuries i ON t.team_id = i.team_id
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.from_team_id OR t.team_id = tr.to_team_id
WHERE i.severity = 'severe'
  AND tr.transfer_status = 'completed'
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN i.severity = 'severe' THEN i.injury_id END) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tr.transfer_status = 'completed' THEN tr.transfer_id END) > 0
audit_note: Can combine one player's severe injury with another player's completed transfer because both tables are joined only at team grain.

query: List players who transferred between teams in the same league and later played for the destination team.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT "players"."player_id", "players"."first_name", "players"."last_name" FROM "transfers" INNER JOIN "players" ON "transfers"."player_id" = "players"."player_id" INNER JOIN "seasons" ON "transfers"."season_id" = "seasons"."season_id" INNER JOIN "leagues" ON "seasons"."league_id" = "leagues"."league_id" INNER JOIN "teams" ON "players"."team_id" = "teams"."team_id" WHERE "transfers"."transfer_status" = ? AND "leagues"."active_flag" = ?
audit_note: Does not compare former and destination league IDs, does not verify a later destination-team appearance, and adds an unrelated active-league condition.

query: List coaches whose training sessions included players who appeared in completed matches for the same team.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT "coaches"."coach_id", "coaches"."first_name", "coaches"."last_name" FROM "coaches" INNER JOIN "teams" ON "coaches"."team_id" = "teams"."team_id" INNER JOIN "player_match_stats" ON "teams"."team_id" = "player_match_stats"."team_id" INNER JOIN "matches" ON "player_match_stats"."match_id" = "matches"."match_id" INNER JOIN "training_sessions" ON "coaches"."coach_id" = "training_sessions"."coach_id" INNER JOIN "player_training_stats" ON "training_sessions"."training_session_id" = "player_training_stats"."training_session_id" WHERE "matches"."match_status" = ?
audit_note: Does not require the player in the coach's training session to be the same player who appeared in the completed match.

query: List active players whose current team differs from both their contract team and latest match team.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.team_id
FROM players p
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
JOIN matches m ON pms.match_id = m.match_id
WHERE p.current_status = 'active'
  AND p.team_id != c.team_id
  AND p.team_id != (
    SELECT pms2.team_id
    FROM player_match_stats pms2
    JOIN matches m2 ON pms2.match_id = m2.match_id
    WHERE pms2.player_id = p.player_id
    ORDER BY m2.match_date DESC, m2.match_id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
  AND c.team_id != (
    SELECT pms2.team_id
    FROM player_match_stats pms2
    JOIN matches m2 ON pms2.match_id = m2.match_id
    WHERE pms2.player_id = p.player_id
    ORDER BY m2.match_date DESC, m2.match_id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
audit_note: Adds an unrequested requirement that the contract team also differ from the latest match team.

query: List completed matches with player performances, injury records, and contract details for the same player.
sql:
SELECT m.match_id, m.match_date, m.home_team_id, m.away_team_id, pms.player_id, pms.scores, pms.assists, i.injury_type, i.injury_status, c.contract_type, c.contract_status
FROM matches m
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON m.match_id = pms.match_id
JOIN players p ON pms.player_id = p.player_id
JOIN injuries i ON p.player_id = i.player_id
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
WHERE m.match_status = 'completed'

query: List teams that had completed matches, active contracts, injuries, and completed transfers in the same season.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN matches m ON t.team_id = m.home_team_id OR t.team_id = m.away_team_id
JOIN seasons s ON m.season_id = s.season_id
JOIN contracts c ON t.team_id = c.team_id AND c.contract_status = 'active'
JOIN injuries i ON t.team_id = i.team_id
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.to_team_id OR t.team_id = tr.from_team_id
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.match_id) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT c.contract_id) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT i.injury_id) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT tr.transfer_id) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT s.season_id) > 0
audit_note: Does not tie injuries, contracts, or transfers to the same season as the completed matches.

query: List players who appeared for one team, trained with another team, and transferred to a third team.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT "players"."player_id", "players"."first_name", "players"."last_name" FROM "players" INNER JOIN "player_match_stats" ON "players"."player_id" = "player_match_stats"."player_id" INNER JOIN "player_training_stats" ON "players"."player_id" = "player_training_stats"."player_id" INNER JOIN "transfers" ON "players"."player_id" = "transfers"."player_id"
audit_note: Never enforces three different teams and never requires the transfer to be completed.

query: List leagues whose teams had both surgery-required injuries and permanent transfers.
sql:
SELECT l.league_id, l.league_name
FROM leagues l
JOIN teams t ON l.league_id = t.league_id
JOIN injuries i ON t.team_id = i.team_id
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.from_team_id
WHERE i.surgery_required_flag = '1'
  AND tr.transfer_type = 'permanent'
GROUP BY l.league_id, l.league_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN i.surgery_required_flag = '1' THEN i.injury_id END) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tr.transfer_type = 'permanent' THEN tr.transfer_id END) > 0
audit_note: Checks permanent transfers only through from_team_id, excluding destination-team transfer activity.

query: List players whose injury match was played between their former and destination teams.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN injuries i ON p.player_id = i.player_id
JOIN matches m ON i.match_id = m.match_id
JOIN teams t ON m.home_team_id = t.team_id
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON m.match_id = pms.match_id AND p.player_id = pms.player_id
JOIN leagues l ON m.league_id = l.league_id
WHERE t.team_id != p.team_id
  AND (
    EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM transfers tr
      WHERE tr.player_id = p.player_id
        AND tr.from_team_id = t.team_id
        AND tr.to_team_id = p.team_id
        AND tr.transfer_date < m.match_date
    )
    OR
    EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM transfers tr
      WHERE tr.player_id = p.player_id
        AND tr.from_team_id = p.team_id
        AND tr.to_team_id = t.team_id
        AND tr.transfer_date > m.match_date
    )
  )
audit_note: Does not directly require the injury match teams to equal the transfer's former and destination teams and relies on current-team assumptions.

query: List coaches who led high-intensity sessions for players with match ratings above 8.
sql:
SELECT c.coach_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
FROM coaches c
JOIN training_sessions ts ON c.coach_id = ts.coach_id
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON ts.training_session_id = pts.training_session_id
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON pts.player_id = pms.player_id
WHERE ts.intensity_level = 'high'
  AND pms.player_rating > 8
GROUP BY c.coach_id, c.first_name, c.last_name

query: List teams whose active players have contracts, match statistics, and training statistics.
sql: SELECT "teams"."team_id", "teams"."team_name", COUNT(*) AS "has_contract", COUNT(*) AS "has_match_stats", COUNT(*) AS "has_training_stats" FROM "players" INNER JOIN "contracts" ON "players"."player_id" = "contracts"."player_id" INNER JOIN "player_match_stats" ON "players"."player_id" = "player_match_stats"."player_id" INNER JOIN "player_training_stats" ON "players"."player_id" = "player_training_stats"."player_id" INNER JOIN "teams" ON "players"."team_id" = "teams"."team_id" WHERE "players"."active_flag" = ? GROUP BY "teams"."team_id", "teams"."team_name" HAVING "has_contract" > ? AND "has_match_stats" > ? AND "has_training_stats" > ?

query: List players who completed a transfer and then recorded match statistics in the same season.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT "players"."player_id", "players"."first_name", "players"."last_name" FROM "players" INNER JOIN "player_match_stats" ON "players"."player_id" = "player_match_stats"."player_id" INNER JOIN "seasons" ON "player_match_stats"."season_id" = "seasons"."season_id" INNER JOIN "transfers" ON "players"."player_id" = "transfers"."player_id"
audit_note: Never requires a completed transfer, same-season equality, or that the match appearance occurred after the transfer.

query: List seasons containing completed matches, training sessions, injuries, and transfers for the same team.
sql: SELECT "seasons"."season_id", "seasons"."season_name", "teams"."team_id", "teams"."team_name", COUNT(*) AS "match_count", COUNT(*) AS "training_count", COUNT(*) AS "injury_count", COUNT(*) AS "transfer_count" FROM "seasons" INNER JOIN "matches" ON "seasons"."season_id" = "matches"."season_id" INNER JOIN "injuries" ON "matches"."match_id" = "injuries"."match_id" INNER JOIN "teams" ON "injuries"."team_id" = "teams"."team_id" INNER JOIN "training_sessions" ON "seasons"."season_id" = "training_sessions"."season_id" INNER JOIN "transfers" ON "seasons"."season_id" = "transfers"."season_id" WHERE "matches"."match_status" = ? GROUP BY "seasons"."season_id", "seasons"."season_name", "teams"."team_id", "teams"."team_name" HAVING "match_count" > ? AND "training_count" > ? AND "injury_count" > ? AND "transfer_count" > ?
audit_note: Training sessions and transfers are joined only by season, so they may belong to different teams from the matched injury and match.

query: List leagues where at least one player has an active contract, a completed transfer, a match appearance, and a training record.
sql: SELECT "leagues"."league_id", "leagues"."league_name", COUNT(*) AS "contract_count", COUNT(*) AS "transfer_count", COUNT(*) AS "match_count", COUNT(*) AS "training_count" FROM "players" INNER JOIN "contracts" ON "players"."player_id" = "contracts"."player_id" INNER JOIN "player_match_stats" ON "players"."player_id" = "player_match_stats"."player_id" INNER JOIN "player_training_stats" ON "players"."player_id" = "player_training_stats"."player_id" INNER JOIN "teams" ON "players"."team_id" = "teams"."team_id" INNER JOIN "leagues" ON "teams"."league_id" = "leagues"."league_id" INNER JOIN "transfers" ON "players"."player_id" = "transfers"."player_id" WHERE "contracts"."contract_status" = ? AND "transfers"."transfer_status" = ? GROUP BY "leagues"."league_id", "leagues"."league_name" HAVING "contract_count" >= ? AND "transfer_count" >= ? AND "match_count" >= ? AND "training_count" >= ?

query: Show the 5 leagues with the highest salary caps.
sql:
SELECT leagues.league_name, leagues.salary_cap
FROM leagues
ORDER BY leagues.salary_cap DESC
LIMIT 5

query: Show the 5 seasons with the largest total revenue.
sql:
SELECT season_id, season_name, revenue_total
FROM seasons
ORDER BY revenue_total DESC
LIMIT 5

query: Show the 10 teams with the highest team values.
sql:
SELECT teams.team_name, teams.team_value
FROM teams
ORDER BY teams.team_value DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 teams with the largest annual revenue.
sql:
SELECT team_name, annual_revenue
FROM teams
ORDER BY annual_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 coaches with the highest annual salaries.
sql:
SELECT coaches.coach_id, coaches.first_name, coaches.last_name, coaches.annual_salary
FROM coaches
ORDER BY coaches.annual_salary DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 coaches with the most career wins.
sql:
SELECT coach_id, first_name, last_name, wins
FROM coaches
ORDER BY wins DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 players with the highest market values.
sql:
SELECT players.player_id, players.full_name, players.market_value
FROM players
ORDER BY players.market_value DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 players with the highest annual salaries.
sql:
SELECT players.player_id, players.first_name, players.last_name, players.annual_salary
FROM players
ORDER BY players.annual_salary DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 matches with the largest attendance.
sql:
SELECT matches.match_id, matches.home_team_id, matches.away_team_id, matches.match_date, matches.attendance
FROM matches
ORDER BY matches.attendance DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 matches with the highest ticket revenue.
sql:
SELECT match_id, ticket_revenue
FROM matches
ORDER BY ticket_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 player performances with the highest ratings.
sql:
SELECT player_id, match_id, player_rating
FROM player_match_stats
ORDER BY player_rating DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 contracts with the largest base salaries.
sql:
SELECT contracts.contract_id, contracts.base_salary, contracts.player_id, contracts.team_id
FROM contracts
ORDER BY contracts.base_salary DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 injuries with the most games missed.
sql:
SELECT injury_id, player_id, games_missed
FROM injuries
ORDER BY games_missed DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 training sessions with the longest duration.
sql:
SELECT training_session_id, session_date, planned_duration_minutes, actual_duration_minutes
FROM training_sessions
ORDER BY actual_duration_minutes DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 transfers with the highest transfer fees.
sql:
SELECT transfers.transfer_id, transfers.player_id, transfers.from_team_id, transfers.to_team_id, transfers.transfer_fee
FROM transfers
ORDER BY transfers.transfer_fee DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 leagues by number of active teams.
sql:
SELECT l.league_name
FROM leagues l
JOIN teams t ON l.league_id = t.league_id
WHERE t.active_flag = '1'
GROUP BY l.league_id
ORDER BY COUNT(t.team_id) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 teams by number of active players.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN players p ON t.team_id = p.team_id
WHERE p.active_flag = '1'
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
ORDER BY COUNT(p.player_id) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 teams by number of active coaches.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN coaches c ON t.team_id = c.team_id
WHERE c.active_flag = '1'
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
ORDER BY COUNT(c.coach_id) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 players by total match scores.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.full_name
FROM players p
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.full_name
ORDER BY SUM(pms.scores) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 players by average match rating.
sql: SELECT "players"."player_id", "players"."first_name", "players"."last_name", AVG("player_match_stats"."player_rating") AS "avg_rating" FROM "players" INNER JOIN "player_match_stats" ON "players"."player_id" = "player_match_stats"."player_id" GROUP BY "players"."player_id", "players"."first_name", "players"."last_name" ORDER BY "avg_rating" DESC LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 teams by completed match wins.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN matches m ON t.team_id = m.winner_team_id
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
ORDER BY COUNT(m.match_id) DESC
LIMIT 10
audit_note: Ranks wins from all match statuses and never requires completed matches.

query: Show the top 10 seasons by completed match attendance.
sql:
SELECT s.season_id, s.season_name, s.season_year
FROM seasons s
JOIN matches m ON s.season_id = m.season_id
GROUP BY s.season_id
ORDER BY SUM(m.attendance) DESC
LIMIT 10
audit_note: Ranks season attendance from all matches rather than completed matches only.

query: Show the top 10 players by total base salary across contracts.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.full_name
FROM players p
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.full_name
ORDER BY SUM(c.base_salary) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 teams by active-contract payroll.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN contracts c ON t.team_id = c.team_id
WHERE c.contract_status = 'active'
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
ORDER BY SUM(c.base_salary) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 players by number of injury records.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.full_name
FROM players p
JOIN injuries i ON p.player_id = i.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.full_name
ORDER BY COUNT(i.injury_id) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 teams by total games missed through injury.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name, SUM(i.games_missed) AS total_games_missed
FROM teams t
JOIN injuries i ON t.team_id = i.team_id
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
ORDER BY total_games_missed DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 coaches by number of training sessions led.
sql:
SELECT c.coach_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
FROM coaches c
JOIN training_sessions ts ON c.coach_id = ts.coach_id
GROUP BY c.coach_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
ORDER BY COUNT(ts.training_session_id) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 players by average readiness score.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON p.player_id = pts.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY AVG(pts.readiness_score) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 teams by total training load.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON t.team_id = pts.team_id
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
ORDER BY SUM(pts.training_load) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 players by completed transfer fees.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.full_name
FROM players p
JOIN transfers t ON p.player_id = t.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.full_name
ORDER BY SUM(t.transfer_fee) DESC
LIMIT 10
audit_note: Sums fees from every transfer status instead of completed transfers only.

query: Show the top 10 destination teams by incoming transfer fees.
sql:
SELECT t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.to_team_id
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
ORDER BY SUM(tr.transfer_fee) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 leagues by completed match ticket revenue.
sql:
SELECT l.league_name
FROM leagues l
JOIN matches m ON l.league_id = m.league_id
GROUP BY l.league_id
ORDER BY SUM(m.ticket_revenue) DESC
LIMIT 10
audit_note: Sums ticket revenue from all match statuses instead of completed matches only.

query: Show the top 10 positions by average player market value.
sql:
SELECT players.position
FROM players
GROUP BY players.position
ORDER BY AVG(players.market_value) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 teams by average player match rating.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON t.team_id = pms.team_id
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
ORDER BY AVG(pms.player_rating) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 players by combined match and training efficiency scores.
sql:
SELECT 
    p.player_id,
    p.first_name,
    p.last_name,
    pms.player_rating,
    pts.readiness_score
FROM players p
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON p.player_id = pts.player_id
ORDER BY (pms.player_rating + pts.readiness_score) DESC
LIMIT 10
audit_note: Ranks individual match-training row combinations, uses player_rating rather than match efficiency_score, and does not aggregate per player.

query: Show the top 3 players by market value within each team.
sql:
WITH ranked_players AS (
    SELECT
        p.team_id,
        p.player_id,
        p.full_name,
        p.market_value,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.team_id ORDER BY p.market_value DESC) AS rn
    FROM players p
)
SELECT
    team_id,
    player_id,
    full_name,
    market_value
FROM ranked_players
WHERE rn <= 3

query: Show the highest-paid coach in each team.
sql:
WITH RankedCoaches AS (
    SELECT
        t.team_name,
        c.first_name,
        c.last_name,
        c.annual_salary,
        t.team_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.team_id ORDER BY c.annual_salary DESC) AS rn
    FROM coaches c
    JOIN teams t ON c.team_id = t.team_id
)
SELECT
    team_name,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    annual_salary
FROM RankedCoaches
WHERE rn = 1

query: Show the top 3 teams by completed-match revenue within each league.
sql:
WITH team_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    l.league_id,
    t.team_id,
    l.league_name,
    t.team_name,
    SUM(m.ticket_revenue + m.sponsorship_revenue) AS total_revenue
  FROM leagues l
  JOIN matches m ON l.league_id = m.league_id
  JOIN teams t ON m.home_team_id = t.team_id
  WHERE m.match_status = 'completed'
  GROUP BY l.league_id, t.team_id, l.league_name, t.team_name
),
ranked_teams AS (
  SELECT
    league_name,
    team_name,
    total_revenue,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY league_id ORDER BY total_revenue DESC) AS rn
  FROM team_revenue
)
SELECT
  league_name,
  team_name
FROM ranked_teams
WHERE rn <= 3

query: Show the top 3 players by average match rating within each position.
sql:
WITH player_avg_ratings AS (
    SELECT
        p.position,
        p.player_id,
        p.full_name,
        AVG(pms.player_rating) AS avg_rating
    FROM players p
    JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
    GROUP BY p.position, p.player_id, p.full_name
),
ranked_players AS (
    SELECT
        position,
        player_id,
        full_name,
        avg_rating,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY position ORDER BY avg_rating DESC) AS rank_in_position
    FROM player_avg_ratings
)
SELECT
    position,
    player_id,
    full_name
FROM ranked_players
WHERE rank_in_position <= 3
ORDER BY position, rank_in_position

query: Show the top 3 teams by active-contract payroll within each league.
sql:
WITH league_payroll AS (
    SELECT
        l.league_id,
        t.team_id,
        t.team_name,
        l.league_name,
        SUM(c.base_salary) AS total_payroll
    FROM contracts c
    JOIN teams t ON c.team_id = t.team_id
    JOIN leagues l ON t.league_id = l.league_id
    WHERE c.contract_status = 'active'
    GROUP BY l.league_id, t.team_id, t.team_name, l.league_name
),
ranked_teams AS (
    SELECT
        league_name,
        team_name,
        total_payroll,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY league_id ORDER BY total_payroll DESC) AS rn
    FROM league_payroll
)
SELECT
    league_name,
    team_name
FROM ranked_teams
WHERE rn <= 3

query: Show the top 5 players by scoring rate among players with at least three match appearances.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
HAVING COUNT(pms.match_id) >= 3
ORDER BY SUM(pms.scores) * 1.0 / COUNT(pms.match_id) DESC
LIMIT 5

query: Show the top 3 teams by injury rate among teams with at least five active players.
sql: SELECT "teams"."team_name", "teams"."team_id", COUNT(*) AS "injury_count", COUNT(*) AS "active_player_count" FROM "injuries" INNER JOIN "players" ON "injuries"."player_id" = "players"."player_id" INNER JOIN "teams" ON "injuries"."team_id" = "teams"."team_id" WHERE "players"."active_flag" = ? GROUP BY "teams"."team_id", "teams"."team_name" HAVING "active_player_count" >= ? ORDER BY "injury_count" DESC LIMIT 3
audit_note: Uses identical fanout counts as injury count and active-player count, never calculates a rate, and ranks by injury rows.

query: Show the top 3 players by training readiness within each team.
sql:
WITH ranked_players AS (
    SELECT
        p.team_id,
        p.player_id,
        p.first_name,
        p.last_name,
        pts.readiness_score,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.team_id ORDER BY pts.readiness_score DESC) AS rn
    FROM player_training_stats pts
    JOIN players p ON pts.player_id = p.player_id
)
SELECT
    team_id,
    player_id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    readiness_score
FROM ranked_players
WHERE rn <= 3
audit_note: Ranks individual training records, so a player can occupy multiple top-three slots instead of ranking distinct players.

query: Show the top 3 destination teams by transfer fees within each season.
sql:
WITH team_season_fees AS (
    SELECT
        s.season_name,
        t.team_name,
        tr.to_team_id,
        tr.season_id,
        SUM(tr.transfer_fee) AS total_transfer_fees
    FROM transfers tr
    JOIN seasons s ON tr.season_id = s.season_id
    JOIN teams t ON tr.to_team_id = t.team_id
    GROUP BY tr.season_id, tr.to_team_id, s.season_name, t.team_name
),
ranked_teams AS (
    SELECT
        season_name,
        team_name,
        total_transfer_fees,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY season_id ORDER BY total_transfer_fees DESC) AS rn
    FROM team_season_fees
)
SELECT
    season_name,
    team_name
FROM ranked_teams
WHERE rn <= 3

query: Show the top 5 players by contract value among players with at least one completed transfer.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.full_name, c.base_salary
FROM players p
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
JOIN transfers t ON p.player_id = t.player_id
WHERE t.transfer_status = 'completed'
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.full_name, c.base_salary
ORDER BY c.base_salary DESC
LIMIT 5
audit_note: Uses one contract's base salary as contract value and can return multiple rows per player instead of aggregating total contract value.

query: Show the top 3 leagues by average team value among leagues with at least two teams.
sql: SELECT "leagues"."league_name", "leagues"."league_id", AVG("teams"."team_value") AS "avg_team_value", COUNT(*) AS "team_count" FROM "leagues" INNER JOIN "teams" ON "leagues"."league_id" = "teams"."league_id" GROUP BY "leagues"."league_id", "leagues"."league_name" HAVING "team_count" >= ? ORDER BY "avg_team_value" DESC LIMIT 3

query: Show the top 3 seasons by ticket revenue among seasons with at least three completed matches.
sql:
SELECT s.season_id, s.season_name
FROM seasons s
JOIN matches m ON s.season_id = m.season_id
WHERE m.match_status = 'completed'
GROUP BY s.season_id, s.season_name
HAVING COUNT(m.match_id) >= 3
ORDER BY SUM(m.ticket_revenue) DESC
LIMIT 3

query: Show the top 5 coaches by win percentage among coaches with at least 20 recorded matches.
sql:
SELECT c.coach_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.wins, c.losses, c.draws
FROM coaches c
WHERE (c.wins + c.losses + c.draws) >= 20
ORDER BY CAST(c.wins AS REAL) / (c.wins + c.losses + c.draws) DESC
LIMIT 5

query: Show the top 3 teams by average player efficiency within each league.
sql:
WITH team_efficiency AS (
    SELECT
        l.league_id,
        t.team_id,
        l.league_name,
        t.team_name,
        AVG(pms.efficiency_score) AS avg_efficiency
    FROM leagues l
    JOIN teams t ON l.league_id = t.league_id
    JOIN player_match_stats pms ON t.team_id = pms.team_id
    JOIN players pl ON pms.player_id = pl.player_id
    GROUP BY l.league_id, t.team_id, l.league_name, t.team_name
),
ranked_teams AS (
    SELECT
        league_name,
        team_name,
        avg_efficiency,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY league_id ORDER BY avg_efficiency DESC) AS rank
    FROM team_efficiency
)
SELECT
    league_name,
    team_name
FROM ranked_teams
WHERE rank <= 3

query: Show the top 5 players by match rating and readiness combined among players with both records.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, pms.player_rating, pts.readiness_score
FROM players p
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON p.player_id = pts.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, pms.player_rating, pts.readiness_score
ORDER BY pms.player_rating + pts.readiness_score DESC
LIMIT 5
audit_note: Ranks cross-products of individual match and training records rather than one combined aggregated score per player.

query: List team identifiers that appear either in player records or coach records.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_id
FROM teams t
JOIN players p ON t.team_id = p.team_id
JOIN coaches c ON t.team_id = c.team_id
audit_note: Uses inner joins and returns only teams present in both player and coach records instead of the union of either source.

query: List player identifiers that appear either in match statistics or training statistics.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id
FROM players p
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON p.player_id = pts.player_id
audit_note: Uses inner joins and returns only players present in both match and training statistics instead of either source.

query: List team identifiers that appear either as home teams or away teams.
sql: SELECT home_team_id, away_team_id FROM matches
audit_note: Returns home and away identifiers as two columns rather than one unioned set of team identifiers.

query: List season identifiers that appear either in matches or training sessions.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.season_id
FROM seasons s
JOIN matches m ON s.season_id = m.season_id
JOIN training_sessions ts ON s.season_id = ts.season_id
audit_note: Uses inner joins and returns only seasons present in both matches and training sessions instead of either source.

query: List player identifiers that appear either in contracts or injuries.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id
FROM players p
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
JOIN injuries i ON p.player_id = i.player_id
audit_note: Uses inner joins and returns only players present in both contracts and injuries instead of either source.

query: List team identifiers that appear either in contracts or transfers.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_id
FROM teams t
JOIN contracts c ON t.team_id = c.team_id
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.to_team_id OR t.team_id = tr.from_team_id
audit_note: Uses inner joins and returns only teams present in contracts and transfers instead of either source.

query: List players who are either active or injured.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.current_status
FROM players p
JOIN injuries i ON p.player_id = i.player_id
WHERE p.current_status = 'active' OR i.injury_status = 'active'
audit_note: The injury inner join excludes active players without injuries and does not simply select players whose status is active or injured.

query: List teams that are either active or have more than five championships.
sql:
SELECT teams.team_id, teams.team_name
FROM teams
WHERE teams.active_flag = '1' OR teams.championships_won > 5

query: List matches that are either completed or scheduled.
sql:
SELECT matches.match_id, matches.match_date, matches.home_team_id, matches.away_team_id, matches.match_status
FROM matches
WHERE matches.match_status IN ('completed', 'scheduled')

query: List contracts that are either active or pending.
sql:
SELECT contracts.contract_id, contracts.player_id, contracts.team_id, contracts.contract_status
FROM contracts
WHERE contracts.contract_status IN ('active', 'pending')

query: List injuries that are either severe or moderate.
sql:
SELECT injuries.injury_id, injuries.player_id, injuries.injury_type, injuries.severity, injuries.injury_date
FROM injuries
WHERE injuries.severity IN ('severe', 'moderate')

query: List training sessions that are either high intensity or maximum intensity.
sql:
SELECT training_session_id, session_date, intensity_level
FROM training_sessions
WHERE intensity_level IN ('high', 'maximum')

query: List transfers that are either permanent or loan transfers.
sql:
SELECT transfer_id, player_id, from_team_id, to_team_id, transfer_type, transfer_date
FROM transfers
WHERE transfer_type IN ('permanent', 'loan')

query: List leagues that are either professional or semi-professional.
sql:
SELECT league_id, league_name, competition_level
FROM leagues
WHERE competition_level IN ('professional', 'semi_professional')

query: List coaches who are either head coaches or assistant coaches.
sql:
SELECT coach_id, first_name, last_name, coach_role
FROM coaches
WHERE coach_role IN ('head_coach', 'assistant_coach')

query: List players who have both match statistics and training statistics.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON p.player_id = pts.player_id

query: List teams that have both players and coaches.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN players p ON t.team_id = p.team_id
JOIN coaches c ON t.team_id = c.team_id
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_id) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT c.coach_id) > 0

query: List seasons that have both matches and training sessions.
sql:
SELECT s.season_id, s.season_name
FROM seasons s
JOIN matches m ON s.season_id = m.season_id
JOIN training_sessions t ON s.season_id = t.season_id
GROUP BY s.season_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.match_id) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT t.training_session_id) > 0

query: List players who have both contracts and injury records.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
JOIN injuries i ON p.player_id = i.player_id

query: List teams that have both completed matches and active contracts.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN matches m ON t.team_id = m.home_team_id OR t.team_id = m.away_team_id
JOIN contracts c ON t.team_id = c.team_id
WHERE c.contract_status = 'active'
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.match_id) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT c.contract_id) > 0
audit_note: Never filters matches to completed status.

query: List players with match appearances but no training records.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT "players"."player_id", "players"."first_name", "players"."last_name" FROM "players" INNER JOIN "player_match_stats" ON "players"."player_id" = "player_match_stats"."player_id" WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "player_training_stats" WHERE "players"."player_id" = "player_training_stats"."player_id")

query: List players with training records but no match appearances.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON p.player_id = pts.player_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM player_match_stats pms
    WHERE pms.player_id = p.player_id
)

query: List teams with active contracts but no completed transfers.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN contracts c ON t.team_id = c.team_id
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.from_team_id OR t.team_id = tr.to_team_id
WHERE c.contract_status = 'active'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM transfers tr2
    WHERE (tr2.from_team_id = t.team_id OR tr2.to_team_id = t.team_id)
      AND tr2.transfer_status = 'completed'
  )
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
audit_note: The transfer inner join excludes teams with active contracts and no transfer records, even though they have no completed transfers.

query: List players with injury records but no active contract.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN injuries i ON p.player_id = i.player_id
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM contracts c2
    WHERE c2.player_id = p.player_id
    AND c2.contract_status = 'active'
)
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
audit_note: The contract inner join excludes injured players with no contracts, even though they have no active contract.

query: List coaches who led training sessions but have no active team.
sql:
SELECT c.coach_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
FROM coaches c
JOIN training_sessions ts ON c.coach_id = ts.coach_id
JOIN teams t ON c.team_id = t.team_id
WHERE c.active_flag = '1'
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM teams t2
    WHERE t2.team_id = c.team_id
    AND t2.active_flag = '1'
)
audit_note: Adds an unrequested active-coach restriction while the question only requires that the coach's team not be active.

query: List teams that appeared as home teams but never as away teams.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN matches m ON t.team_id = m.home_team_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM matches m2
    WHERE m2.away_team_id = t.team_id
)
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name

query: List players who scored in matches but never recorded an assist.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
WHERE pms.scores > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM player_match_stats pms2
    WHERE pms2.player_id = p.player_id
      AND pms2.assists > 0
  )
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name

query: List teams with high-intensity training sessions but no recovery sessions.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM training_sessions ts
    WHERE ts.team_id = t.team_id
      AND ts.intensity_level = 'high'
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM training_sessions ts
    WHERE ts.team_id = t.team_id
      AND ts.session_type = 'recovery'
)

query: List players who completed transfers but have no current active contract.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN transfers t ON p.player_id = t.player_id
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM contracts c2
    WHERE c2.player_id = p.player_id
    AND c2.contract_status = 'active'
)
audit_note: Never filters completed transfers and the contract inner join excludes transferred players with no contracts.

query: List seasons with completed matches but no completed transfers.
sql:
SELECT s.season_id, s.season_name
FROM seasons s
JOIN matches m ON s.season_id = m.season_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM transfers t
    WHERE t.season_id = s.season_id
)
GROUP BY s.season_id, s.season_name
audit_note: Does not require completed matches and excludes seasons having any transfer rather than only completed transfers.

query: List teams with injuries but no surgery-required injuries.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN injuries i ON t.team_id = i.team_id
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN i.surgery_required_flag = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

query: List players with active contracts but no match statistics.
sql:
SELECT "players"."player_id", "players"."first_name", "players"."last_name"
FROM "players"
INNER JOIN "contracts" ON "players"."player_id" = "contracts"."player_id"
WHERE "contracts"."contract_status" = 'active'
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "player_match_stats"
    WHERE "player_match_stats"."player_id" = "players"."player_id"
)

query: List leagues with active teams but no completed matches.
sql:
SELECT l.league_id, l.league_name
FROM leagues l
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM teams t
    WHERE t.league_id = l.league_id
      AND t.active_flag = '1'
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM matches m
    WHERE m.league_id = l.league_id
      AND m.match_id IS NOT NULL
)
audit_note: Checks for no matches at all rather than no completed matches.

query: List players who trained for one team but played matches for another.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT "players"."player_id", "players"."first_name", "players"."last_name" FROM "players" INNER JOIN "player_match_stats" ON "players"."player_id" = "player_match_stats"."player_id" INNER JOIN "player_training_stats" ON "players"."player_id" = "player_training_stats"."player_id"
audit_note: Never compares the training team with the match team, so any player having both record types qualifies.

query: List teams that received players in transfers but never sent a player.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.to_team_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM transfers tr2
    WHERE tr2.from_team_id = t.team_id
)
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name

query: List players who have match statistics and training statistics but no injury record.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM player_match_stats pms
    WHERE pms.player_id = p.player_id
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM player_training_stats pts
    WHERE pts.player_id = p.player_id
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM injuries i
    WHERE i.player_id = p.player_id
)

query: List teams with both completed matches and completed transfers but no active contracts.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN matches m ON t.team_id = m.home_team_id OR t.team_id = m.away_team_id
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.from_team_id OR t.team_id = tr.to_team_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM contracts c
    WHERE c.team_id = t.team_id
      AND c.contract_status = 'active'
)
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
audit_note: Does not require the matched matches or transfers to have completed status.

query: List players with both active contracts and injuries but no completed transfer.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
JOIN injuries i ON p.player_id = i.player_id
JOIN transfers t ON p.player_id = t.player_id
WHERE c.contract_status = 'active'
  AND i.injury_status = 'active'
  AND t.transfer_status != 'completed'
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
HAVING NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM transfers t2
    WHERE t2.player_id = p.player_id
      AND t2.transfer_status = 'completed'
)
audit_note: Requires an active injury rather than any injury and excludes players with no transfer rows even though they have no completed transfer.

query: List leagues with both completed and scheduled matches but no cancelled matches.
sql:
SELECT l.league_id, l.league_name
FROM leagues l
JOIN matches m ON l.league_id = m.league_id
GROUP BY l.league_id
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN m.match_status = 'completed' THEN 1 END) > 0
   AND COUNT(CASE WHEN m.match_status = 'scheduled' THEN 1 END) > 0
   AND COUNT(CASE WHEN m.match_status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 END) = 0

query: List teams with players in both active and injured status but no suspended players.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN players p ON t.team_id = p.team_id
JOIN injuries i ON p.player_id = i.player_id
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN p.current_status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN i.injury_status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN p.current_status = 'suspended' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
audit_note: Uses active injury records instead of requiring teams to contain both active-status and injured-status players.

query: List players who appeared for both their current team and another team but never transferred.
sql:
WITH player_team_counts AS (
    SELECT player_id, COUNT(DISTINCT team_id) AS team_count
    FROM players
    GROUP BY player_id
),
players_with_transfers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT player_id
    FROM transfers
)
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN player_team_counts pt ON p.player_id = pt.player_id
WHERE pt.team_count > 1
  AND p.player_id NOT IN (SELECT player_id FROM players_with_transfers)
audit_note: Counts team IDs in the one-row-per-player players table, making the more-than-one-team condition impossible; match statistics should supply team history.

query: List coaches who led both high-intensity and recovery sessions but no cancelled session.
sql:
SELECT c.coach_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
FROM coaches c
JOIN training_sessions ts ON c.coach_id = ts.coach_id
GROUP BY c.coach_id
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN ts.intensity_level = 'high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN ts.intensity_level = 'low' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN ts.cancelled_flag = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
audit_note: Checks low intensity instead of recovery session_type.

query: List teams that were both home and away winners but never drew a match.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN matches m ON t.team_id = m.home_team_id OR t.team_id = m.away_team_id
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN m.home_team_id = t.team_id AND m.winner_team_id = t.team_id THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN m.away_team_id = t.team_id AND m.winner_team_id = t.team_id THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN m.winner_team_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
audit_note: Treats every NULL winner, including scheduled or cancelled matches, as a draw and does not restrict the analysis to completed matches.

query: List players with both surgery-required and non-surgery injuries but no reinjury record.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN injuries i ON p.player_id = i.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN i.surgery_required_flag = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN i.surgery_required_flag = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN i.reinjury_flag = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

query: List seasons with matches in both regular season and playoff stages but no final.
sql:
SELECT s.season_id, s.season_name
FROM seasons s
JOIN matches m ON s.season_id = m.season_id
GROUP BY s.season_id, s.season_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.competition_stage = 'regular_season' THEN m.match_id END) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.competition_stage IN ('playoff', 'quarterfinal', 'semifinal') THEN m.match_id END) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.competition_stage = 'final' THEN m.match_id END) = 0

query: List teams that both sent and received transferred players but had no free transfer.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN transfers tr_out ON t.team_id = tr_out.from_team_id
JOIN transfers tr_in ON t.team_id = tr_in.to_team_id
WHERE t.team_id NOT IN (
    SELECT team_id
    FROM (
        SELECT from_team_id AS team_id FROM transfers WHERE transfer_type = 'free'
        UNION
        SELECT to_team_id AS team_id FROM transfers WHERE transfer_type = 'free'
    )
)
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
audit_note: Checks transfer_type = 'free', but the database stores the category as 'free_transfer'.

query: List players with both standard and loan contracts but no pending contract.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN c.contract_type = 'standard' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN c.contract_type = 'loan' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN c.contract_status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

query: List leagues whose teams had both high-value and low-value players but no retired players.
sql:
SELECT l.league_id, l.league_name
FROM leagues l
JOIN teams t ON l.league_id = t.league_id
JOIN players p ON t.team_id = p.team_id
WHERE p.current_status != 'retired'
GROUP BY l.league_id, l.league_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.market_value >= (SELECT AVG(market_value) FROM players) THEN p.player_id END) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.market_value < (SELECT AVG(market_value) FROM players) THEN p.player_id END) > 0
audit_note: Filters retired players out before grouping, so it never proves that the league has no retired players.

query: List players with match ratings above 8 and readiness above 80 but no active injury.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON p.player_id = pts.player_id
JOIN injuries i ON p.player_id = i.player_id
WHERE pms.player_rating > 8
  AND pts.readiness_score > 80
  AND i.injury_status != 'active'
audit_note: Requires one non-active injury rather than proving the absence of all active injuries and excludes players with no injury rows.

query: List teams with completed matches, training sessions, and transfers but no injury records.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN matches m ON t.team_id = m.home_team_id
JOIN training_sessions ts ON t.team_id = ts.team_id
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.to_team_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM injuries i
    WHERE i.team_id = t.team_id
)
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
audit_note: Checks only home matches and incoming transfers and never requires the matches to be completed.

query: List leagues with salary caps above the average league salary cap.
sql:
SELECT league_id, league_name, salary_cap
FROM leagues
WHERE salary_cap > (SELECT AVG(salary_cap) FROM leagues)

query: List seasons with revenue above the average season revenue.
sql:
SELECT season_id, season_name, revenue_total
FROM seasons
WHERE revenue_total > (SELECT AVG(revenue_total) FROM seasons)

query: List teams valued above the average team value.
sql:
SELECT teams.team_id, teams.team_name, teams.team_value
FROM teams
WHERE teams.team_value > (SELECT AVG(team_value) FROM teams)

query: List teams with annual revenue above the average team revenue.
sql:
SELECT teams.team_id, teams.team_name, teams.annual_revenue
FROM teams
WHERE teams.annual_revenue > (SELECT AVG(annual_revenue) FROM teams)

query: List coaches earning more than the average coach salary.
sql:
SELECT c.coach_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.annual_salary
FROM coaches c
WHERE c.annual_salary > (SELECT AVG(annual_salary) FROM coaches)

query: List coaches with more wins than the average coach.
sql:
SELECT c.coach_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.wins
FROM coaches c
WHERE c.wins > (SELECT AVG(wins) FROM coaches)

query: List players valued above the average player market value.
sql:
SELECT players.player_id, players.full_name, players.market_value
FROM players
WHERE players.market_value > (SELECT AVG(market_value) FROM players)

query: List players earning more than the average player salary.
sql:
SELECT players.player_id, players.first_name, players.last_name, players.annual_salary
FROM players
WHERE players.annual_salary > (SELECT AVG(annual_salary) FROM players)

query: List matches with attendance above the average match attendance.
sql:
SELECT match_id, match_date, home_team_id, away_team_id, attendance
FROM matches
WHERE attendance > (SELECT AVG(attendance) FROM matches)

query: List player performances with ratings above the average player rating.
sql:
SELECT player_id, match_id, player_rating
FROM player_match_stats
WHERE player_rating > (SELECT AVG(player_rating) FROM player_match_stats)

query: List contracts with base salaries above the average contract salary.
sql:
SELECT contracts.contract_id, contracts.player_id, contracts.team_id, contracts.base_salary
FROM contracts
WHERE contracts.base_salary > (SELECT AVG(base_salary) FROM contracts)

query: List injuries causing more games missed than the average injury.
sql:
SELECT i.injury_id, i.player_id, i.games_missed
FROM injuries i
WHERE i.games_missed > (SELECT AVG(i2.games_missed) FROM injuries i2)

query: List training sessions longer than the average training session.
sql:
SELECT training_session_id, session_date, actual_duration_minutes
FROM training_sessions
WHERE actual_duration_minutes > (
    SELECT AVG(actual_duration_minutes)
    FROM training_sessions
)

query: List transfers with fees above the average transfer fee.
sql:
SELECT transfer_id, player_id, from_team_id, to_team_id, transfer_fee
FROM transfers
WHERE transfer_fee > (SELECT AVG(transfer_fee) FROM transfers)

query: List players who have never appeared in a match.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM player_match_stats pms
    WHERE pms.player_id = p.player_id
)

query: List teams valued above the average team value in their league.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name, t.team_value, t.league_id
FROM teams t
WHERE t.team_value > (
    SELECT AVG(t2.team_value)
    FROM teams t2
    WHERE t2.league_id = t.league_id
)

query: List coaches earning more than the average coach salary on their team.
sql:
SELECT c.coach_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.annual_salary, c.team_id
FROM coaches c
JOIN teams t ON c.team_id = t.team_id
WHERE c.annual_salary > (
    SELECT AVG(c2.annual_salary)
    FROM coaches c2
    WHERE c2.team_id = c.team_id
)

query: List players valued above the average player market value on their team.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.market_value, p.team_id
FROM players p
WHERE p.market_value > (
    SELECT AVG(p2.market_value)
    FROM players p2
    WHERE p2.team_id = p.team_id
)

query: List players with more match appearances than the average player with an appearance.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id
HAVING COUNT(pms.player_match_stat_id) > (
    SELECT AVG(appearance_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS appearance_count
        FROM player_match_stats
        GROUP BY player_id
    )
)

query: List players whose average match rating exceeds the average rating of players on their current team.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.team_id
FROM players p
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id
HAVING AVG(pms.player_rating) > (
    SELECT AVG(pms2.player_rating)
    FROM player_match_stats pms2
    JOIN players p2 ON pms2.player_id = p2.player_id
    WHERE p2.team_id = p.team_id
)

query: List teams with more completed wins than the average team.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN matches m ON t.team_id = m.winner_team_id
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > (
    SELECT AVG(win_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS win_count
        FROM matches
        WHERE winner_team_id IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY winner_team_id
    )
)
audit_note: Counts wins from all matches and never restricts winner records to completed matches.

query: List seasons with completed-match attendance above the average season attendance.
sql:
SELECT s.season_id, s.season_name, s.season_year
FROM seasons s
JOIN matches m ON s.season_id = m.season_id
GROUP BY s.season_id, s.season_name, s.season_year
HAVING SUM(m.attendance) > (
    SELECT AVG(total_attendance)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(m2.attendance) AS total_attendance
        FROM matches m2
        GROUP BY m2.season_id
    )
)
audit_note: Sums attendance from all matches and computes the comparison average from all match statuses.

query: List players whose total contract salary is above the average player contract salary.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
HAVING SUM(c.base_salary) > (
    SELECT AVG(total_salary)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(base_salary) AS total_salary
        FROM contracts
        GROUP BY player_id
    )
)

query: List teams whose active-contract payroll is above the average team payroll.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN contracts c ON t.team_id = c.team_id
WHERE c.contract_status = 'active'
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
HAVING SUM(c.base_salary) > (
    SELECT AVG(team_payroll)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(c2.base_salary) AS team_payroll
        FROM contracts c2
        WHERE c2.contract_status = 'active'
        GROUP BY c2.team_id
    )
)

query: List players with more injury records than the average injured player.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN injuries i ON p.player_id = i.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
HAVING COUNT(i.injury_id) > (
    SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT player_id)
    FROM injuries
)

query: List teams whose total games missed is above the average team injury total.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN injuries i ON t.team_id = i.team_id
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
HAVING SUM(i.games_missed) > (
    SELECT AVG(team_total_games_missed)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(i2.games_missed) AS team_total_games_missed
        FROM injuries i2
        GROUP BY i2.team_id
    )
)

query: List coaches who led more training sessions than the average coach.
sql:
SELECT c.coach_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
FROM coaches c
JOIN training_sessions ts ON c.coach_id = ts.coach_id
GROUP BY c.coach_id
HAVING COUNT(ts.training_session_id) > (
    SELECT AVG(session_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS session_count
        FROM training_sessions
        GROUP BY coach_id
    )
)

query: List players whose readiness score is above the average for their team.
sql:
WITH team_avg_readiness AS (
    SELECT
        pts.team_id,
        AVG(pts.readiness_score) AS avg_readiness
    FROM player_training_stats pts
    GROUP BY pts.team_id
)
SELECT
    p.player_id,
    p.first_name,
    p.last_name,
    pts.readiness_score
FROM player_training_stats pts
JOIN players p ON pts.player_id = p.player_id
JOIN teams t ON pts.team_id = t.team_id
JOIN team_avg_readiness tar ON pts.team_id = tar.team_id
WHERE pts.readiness_score > tar.avg_readiness
audit_note: Compares individual training rows with the team average and can return duplicate players rather than comparing each player's average readiness.

query: List teams whose total training load is above the average team load.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON t.team_id = pts.team_id
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
HAVING SUM(pts.training_load) > (
    SELECT AVG(team_total_load)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(training_load) AS team_total_load
        FROM player_training_stats
        GROUP BY team_id
    )
)

query: List players whose completed transfer fees exceed the average transferred player.
sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN transfers t ON p.player_id = t.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
HAVING SUM(t.transfer_fee) > (SELECT AVG(total_fee) FROM (SELECT SUM(transfer_fee) AS total_fee FROM transfers GROUP BY player_id))
audit_note: Never filters transfer_status = 'completed'.

query: List destination teams whose incoming transfer fees exceed the average destination team.
sql:
SELECT t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN (
    SELECT to_team_id, SUM(transfer_fee) AS total_incoming_fees
    FROM transfers
    GROUP BY to_team_id
) tf ON t.team_id = tf.to_team_id
WHERE tf.total_incoming_fees > (
    SELECT AVG(total_fees)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(transfer_fee) AS total_fees
        FROM transfers
        GROUP BY to_team_id
    )
)

query: List matches with ticket revenue above the average for their competition stage.
sql:
SELECT m.match_id, m.competition_stage, m.ticket_revenue
FROM matches m
WHERE m.ticket_revenue > (
    SELECT AVG(m2.ticket_revenue)
    FROM matches m2
    WHERE m2.competition_stage = m.competition_stage
)

query: List contracts whose guaranteed amount is above the average for their contract type.
sql:
SELECT c.contract_id, c.contract_type, c.guaranteed_amount
FROM contracts c
WHERE c.guaranteed_amount > (
    SELECT AVG(c2.guaranteed_amount)
    FROM contracts c2
    WHERE c2.contract_type = c.contract_type
)

query: List injuries whose recovery time is above the average for their injury type.
sql:
SELECT i.injury_id, i.player_id, i.injury_type, i.estimated_days_out
FROM injuries i
WHERE i.estimated_days_out > (
    SELECT AVG(i2.estimated_days_out)
    FROM injuries i2
    WHERE i2.injury_type = i.injury_type
)

query: List transfers whose fee is above the average for their transfer type.
sql:
SELECT t.transfer_id, t.transfer_type, t.transfer_fee
FROM transfers t
WHERE t.transfer_fee > (
    SELECT AVG(t2.transfer_fee)
    FROM transfers t2
    WHERE t2.transfer_type = t.transfer_type
)

query: List the most valuable player on each team.
sql:
WITH RankedPlayers AS (
    SELECT 
        p.team_id,
        p.player_id,
        p.full_name,
        p.market_value,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.team_id ORDER BY p.market_value DESC) AS rn
    FROM players p
)
SELECT 
    team_id,
    player_id,
    full_name,
    market_value
FROM RankedPlayers
WHERE rn = 1

query: List the highest-paid coach on each team.
sql:
WITH RankedCoaches AS (
    SELECT
        t.team_name,
        c.first_name,
        c.last_name,
        c.annual_salary,
        t.team_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.team_id ORDER BY c.annual_salary DESC) AS rn
    FROM coaches c
    JOIN teams t ON c.team_id = t.team_id
)
SELECT
    team_name,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    annual_salary
FROM RankedCoaches
WHERE rn = 1

query: List the highest-revenue completed match in each season.
sql:
WITH ranked_matches AS (
    SELECT
        m.season_id,
        m.match_id,
        m.ticket_revenue,
        m.sponsorship_revenue,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY m.season_id
            ORDER BY (m.ticket_revenue + m.sponsorship_revenue) DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM matches m
    WHERE m.match_status = 'completed'
)
SELECT
    season_id,
    match_id,
    ticket_revenue,
    sponsorship_revenue
FROM ranked_matches
WHERE rn = 1

query: List players whose average match rating is above the average for their team and position.
sql:
WITH team_pos_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        pms.team_id,
        p.position,
        AVG(pms.player_rating) AS avg_rating
    FROM player_match_stats pms
    JOIN players p ON pms.player_id = p.player_id
    GROUP BY pms.team_id, p.position
)
SELECT 
    p.player_id,
    p.first_name,
    p.last_name,
    p.position,
    p.team_id
FROM players p
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
JOIN team_pos_avg tpa ON p.team_id = tpa.team_id AND p.position = tpa.position
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.position, p.team_id
HAVING AVG(pms.player_rating) > tpa.avg_rating
audit_note: Averages all of a player's match records while comparing with the current team's position average, without restricting the player's records to that team.

query: List teams whose active-contract payroll is above the average for teams in the same league.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name, t.league_id, t.salary_payroll
FROM teams t
JOIN contracts c ON t.team_id = c.team_id
WHERE c.contract_status = 'active'
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name, t.league_id, t.salary_payroll
HAVING SUM(c.base_salary) > (
    SELECT AVG(team_payroll)
    FROM (
        SELECT t2.team_id, SUM(c2.base_salary) AS team_payroll
        FROM teams t2
        JOIN contracts c2 ON t2.team_id = c2.team_id
        WHERE c2.contract_status = 'active'
          AND t2.league_id = t.league_id
        GROUP BY t2.team_id
    )
)

query: List leagues whose completed-match ticket revenue is above the average league revenue.
sql:
SELECT l.league_id, l.league_name
FROM leagues l
JOIN matches m ON l.league_id = m.league_id
WHERE m.match_status = 'completed'
GROUP BY l.league_id, l.league_name
HAVING SUM(m.ticket_revenue) > (
    SELECT AVG(league_total_revenue)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(ticket_revenue) AS league_total_revenue
        FROM matches
        WHERE match_status = 'completed'
        GROUP BY league_id
    )
)

query: List players whose total contract value is above the average for players at the same position.
sql:
WITH player_total_value AS (
    SELECT
        p.player_id,
        p.first_name,
        p.last_name,
        p.position,
        (c.base_salary + COALESCE(c.signing_bonus, 0) + COALESCE(c.performance_bonus, 0) + COALESCE(c.appearance_bonus, 0) + COALESCE(c.championship_bonus, 0)) AS total_contract_value
    FROM players p
    JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
),
position_averages AS (
    SELECT
        position,
        AVG(total_contract_value) AS avg_value
    FROM player_total_value
    GROUP BY position
)
SELECT
    ptv.player_id,
    ptv.first_name,
    ptv.last_name,
    ptv.position
FROM player_total_value ptv
JOIN position_averages pa ON ptv.position = pa.position
WHERE ptv.total_contract_value > pa.avg_value
audit_note: Computes contract value separately per contract and never sums each player's contracts before comparing with position averages.

query: List teams whose injury rate is above the average injury rate in their league.
sql:
WITH team_injury_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        t.team_id,
        t.team_name,
        t.league_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT i.injury_id) AS injury_count
    FROM teams t
    JOIN injuries i ON t.team_id = i.team_id
    GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name, t.league_id
),
league_avg_injury AS (
    SELECT 
        league_id,
        AVG(injury_count) AS avg_injury_rate
    FROM team_injury_counts
    GROUP BY league_id
)
SELECT 
    tic.team_id,
    tic.team_name,
    tic.league_id
FROM team_injury_counts tic
JOIN league_avg_injury la ON tic.league_id = la.league_id
WHERE tic.injury_count > la.avg_injury_rate
audit_note: Compares injury counts, not injury rates with an appropriate player or roster denominator.

query: List players whose average readiness score is above the team average and whose match rating is above the position average.
sql:
WITH player_readiness AS (
    SELECT player_id, AVG(readiness_score) AS avg_readiness
    FROM player_training_stats
    GROUP BY player_id
),
team_avg_readiness AS (
    SELECT team_id, AVG(avg_readiness) AS team_avg
    FROM (
        SELECT p.team_id, pr.avg_readiness
        FROM players p
        JOIN player_readiness pr ON p.player_id = pr.player_id
    )
    GROUP BY team_id
),
player_rating AS (
    SELECT player_id, AVG(player_rating) AS avg_rating
    FROM player_match_stats
    GROUP BY player_id
),
pos_avg_rating AS (
    SELECT position, AVG(avg_rating) AS pos_avg
    FROM (
        SELECT p.position, pr.avg_rating
        FROM players p
        JOIN player_rating pr ON p.player_id = pr.player_id
    )
    GROUP BY position
)
SELECT p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN player_readiness pr ON p.player_id = pr.player_id
JOIN team_avg_readiness tar ON p.team_id = tar.team_id
JOIN player_rating pr2 ON p.player_id = pr2.player_id
JOIN pos_avg_rating par ON p.position = par.position
WHERE pr.avg_readiness > tar.team_avg
