  AND pr2.avg_rating > par.pos_avg

query: List coaches whose win percentage is above the average for coaches in the same role.
sql:
SELECT c.coach_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.coach_role, c.wins, c.losses, c.draws
FROM coaches c
WHERE CAST(c.wins AS REAL) / (c.wins + c.losses + c.draws) > (
    SELECT AVG(CAST(c2.wins AS REAL) / (c2.wins + c2.losses + c2.draws))
    FROM coaches c2
    WHERE c2.coach_role = c.coach_role
)
AND (c.wins + c.losses + c.draws) > 0

query: List players who appeared in every completed match played by their team.
sql:
WITH team_completed_matches AS (
    SELECT 
        p.team_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT m.match_id) AS total_completed_matches
    FROM players p
    JOIN matches m ON m.home_team_id = p.team_id OR m.away_team_id = p.team_id
    WHERE m.match_status = 'completed'
    GROUP BY p.team_id
),
player_appearances AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_id,
        p.first_name,
        p.last_name,
        p.team_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT pms.match_id) AS matches_played
    FROM players p
    JOIN player_match_stats pms ON p.player_id = pms.player_id
    JOIN matches m ON pms.match_id = m.match_id
    WHERE m.match_status = 'completed'
    GROUP BY p.player_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.team_id
)
SELECT 
    pa.player_id,
    pa.first_name,
    pa.last_name
FROM player_appearances pa
JOIN team_completed_matches tcm ON pa.team_id = tcm.team_id
WHERE pa.matches_played = tcm.total_completed_matches
audit_note: Counts all of a player's completed appearances without requiring those appearances to be for the player's current team.

query: List teams where every active player has at least one active contract.
sql:
SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name
FROM teams t
JOIN players p ON t.team_id = p.team_id
JOIN contracts c ON p.player_id = c.player_id
WHERE p.active_flag = '1'
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.contract_status = 'active' THEN p.player_id END) = COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_id)
audit_note: The inner contract join removes active players with no contract from the denominator, allowing teams with uncovered active players to pass.

query: List seasons where every completed match has at least one player performance record.
sql:
SELECT s.season_id, s.season_name
FROM seasons s
JOIN matches m ON s.season_id = m.season_id
JOIN player_match_stats pms ON m.match_id = pms.match_id
WHERE m.match_status = 'completed'
GROUP BY s.season_id, s.season_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.match_id) = (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM matches m2
    WHERE m2.season_id = s.season_id
      AND m2.match_status = 'completed'
)

query: List players whose three most recent match ratings improved each time.
sql:
WITH recent_ratings AS (
    SELECT
        pms.player_id,
        pms.player_rating,
        m.match_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pms.player_id ORDER BY m.match_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM player_match_stats pms
    JOIN matches m ON pms.match_id = m.match_id
),
top_three AS (
    SELECT
        player_id,
        player_rating,
        rn
    FROM recent_ratings
    WHERE rn <= 3
),
ranked_top_three AS (
    SELECT
        player_id,
        player_rating,
        rn,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_id ORDER BY rn DESC) AS reverse_rn
    FROM top_three
),
consecutive_checks AS (
    SELECT
        t1.player_id,
        t1.player_rating AS rating1,
        t2.player_rating AS rating2,
        t3.player_rating AS rating3,
        CASE
            WHEN t1.player_rating < t2.player_rating AND t2.player_rating < t3.player_rating THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_strictly_increasing
    FROM ranked_top_three t1
    JOIN ranked_top_three t2 ON t1.player_id = t2.player_id AND t1.reverse_rn = t2.reverse_rn + 1
    JOIN ranked_top_three t3 ON t1.player_id = t3.player_id AND t1.reverse_rn = t3.reverse_rn + 2
)
SELECT
    p.player_id,
    p.first_name,
    p.last_name
FROM players p
JOIN consecutive_checks cc ON p.player_id = cc.player_id
WHERE cc.is_strictly_increasing = 1
audit_note: The chronological comparison is reversed, selecting players whose ratings declined from oldest to newest.

query: List teams whose 2025 completed-match revenue exceeded their 2024 completed-match revenue.
sql:
WITH team_revenue AS (
    SELECT 
        t.team_id,
        t.team_name,
        SUM(m.ticket_revenue + m.sponsorship_revenue) AS total_revenue,
        s.season_year
    FROM teams t
    JOIN matches m ON (t.team_id = m.home_team_id OR t.team_id = m.away_team_id)
    JOIN seasons s ON m.season_id = s.season_id
    WHERE s.season_year IN (2024, 2025)
    GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name, s.season_year
)
SELECT 
    tr2025.team_id,
    tr2025.team_name
FROM team_revenue tr2025
JOIN team_revenue tr2024 ON tr2025.team_id = tr2024.team_id
WHERE tr2025.season_year = 2025
  AND tr2024.season_year = 2024
  AND tr2025.total_revenue > tr2024.total_revenue
audit_note: Includes non-completed matches in both 2024 and 2025 revenue totals.
